name: Train of Thoughts
short_description: Train of Thoughts is a 3-5 player party game where the goal is to be as funny as possible. You do this by filling in part of a sentence. The catch, your answer now becomes the subject of the next sentence. After 5 sentences, vote for the best answers and prove you can become a standup comedian!
detailed_description:
The Gameplay
ToT is a 3 to 5-player party game. Players are presented with a sentence with two varying parts. The first part consists of some dots, where the player's answer will go to finish the sentence. The other part is either the player's input from the previous sentence or a pre-generated subject (only in the first sentence). When all players fill in 5 sentences, the voting process begins. Like all good democratic voting systems, all players get to select the best answer for each of the sentences they just filled in. After this, players can either play another round or finish the game and see who has won.
The goal
A game of ToT can be seen as a short party minigame for whenever you are waiting for someone or when you have a few minutes to spare with your friends and don't know what to do. How you play the game and what you vote for is up to you, with the only rules being to fill in something on the dots, and the player with the most votes wins!
The future
For updates about the development of ToT and the expected launch date please join the discord.
